description: CompositionBrown, yellow and white check shirt with green accents, made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, spread collar with a front button placket, patch pocket on the left chest with stitch detailing and a curved hemFittingRegularWash careMachine wash at 40 degreesWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachTumble dry normal or line dryWarm ironCrafted from soft cotton and designed with cuts that offer a flattering silhouette, this check shirt from highlander is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with jeans and suede boots or sneakers.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight: 6', Shoulders: 18"
